title: ImAcidicSMP Modpack
description: The ImAcidic modpack, which allows for players to explore a large expansive world. Many QoL + Content mods to play around with to make for a pleasant experience
body:
The ImAcidic modpack, which allows for players to explore the large expansive world. Many QoL mods to play around with to make for a pleasant experience.

Features:

- Enderscape
- Veinminer
- Macaw's Mods
- Terralith
- Illager Expansion Recrafted
